expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总测量值，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah total pengukuran, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือการวัดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่างและด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้ด้านหลัง. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu tấm gỗ trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu tấm gỗ nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid ng tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyal ng tabla sa Likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်ဖွဲ့စည်းမှုအတွက်အစိတ်အမျှာကိုအတိအကျတွက်ချက်သည်... etc. (AI translated, please check)
